creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
nagios-plugins already builds fine in a jail without network access.  As it's how the package are built.  Also, the syntax you're forcing *is* the one beging detected by configure:

http://beefy2.isc.freebsd.org/data/latest-per-pkg/nagios-plugins/2.0.3_4%2c1/10amd64-default.log

What problem are you trying to solve ?
